claims.text: Devin Marsh claimed to be the full-time CEO of DataLoom from March 2019.
claims.evidence: DataLoom founded March 2019; served as full-time CEO.

claims.text: Devin Marsh was an Infrastructure Engineer at Stripe from 2017 to mid-2020.
claims.evidence: Infrastructure Engineer at Stripe, full-time from 2017 to mid-2020.

claims.text: Devin Marsh participated in QCon SF as a speaker in November 2018.
claims.evidence: Conference talk 'Building Reliable Payment Ledgers', QCon SF, November 2018. Speaker: Devin Marsh.

claims.text: Devin Marsh participated in Strange Loop as a speaker in September 2019.
claims.evidence: Conference talk 'Infra at Scale', Strange Loop, September 2019. Speaker: Devin Marsh.
EDGAR full-text search: NO filing found.

claims.text: DataLoom was acquired by Cisco in 2021.
claims.evidence: DataLoom does NOT appear among Cisco's 2021 acquisition announcements.

claims.text: Claimed full-time CEO of DataLoom from March 2019 overlaps claimed full-time Stripe employment through mid-2020 — both cannot be true as stated.
claims.evidence: full-time CEO of DataLoom. Infrastructure Engineer at Stripe, full-time from 2017 to mid-2020.
